rights.notes: Migrated from legacy published content; migration does not establish redistribution rights.

segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translation.text: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why did the police have to push Jumbo off the main street?

translation.text: 为什么警察不得不把小象从大街上推走？

segments.text: Last Christmas, the circus owner, Jimmy Gates, decided to take some presents to a children's hospital.

translation.text: 去年圣诞节，马戏团老板吉米·盖茨决定给一家儿童医院送些礼物。

segments.text: Dressed up as Father Christmas and accompanied by a guard of honor of six pretty girls, he set off down the main street of the city riding a baby elephant called Jumbo.

translation.text: 他装扮成圣诞老人，由六位漂亮姑娘组成的仪仗队陪同，骑着一头名叫珍宝的小象沿市区主干道出发了。

segments.text: He should have known that the police would never allow this sort of thing.

translation.text: 他本该想到，警察绝不会允许这种事情发生。

segments.text: A policeman approached Jimmy and told him he ought to have gone along a side street as Jumbo was holding up the traffic.

translation.text: 一名警察走近吉米，告诉他本应走一条小路，因为珍宝阻碍了交通。

segments.text: Though Jimmy agreed to go at once, Jumbo refused to move.

translation.text: 尽管吉米答应马上离开，珍宝却拒绝挪动。

segments.text: Fifteen policemen had to push very hard to get him off the main street.

translation.text: 十五名警察不得不用力推，才把它弄离大街。

segments.text: The police had a difficult time, but they were most amused.

translation.text: 警察们费了好大劲，不过也觉得十分有趣。

segments.text: Jumbo must weigh a few tons, said a policeman afterwards, so it was fortunate that we didn't have to carry him.

translation.text: “珍宝肯定有好几吨重，”一名警察事后说，“幸好我们不用把它抬走。”

segments.text: Of course, we should arrest him, but as he has a good record, we shall let him off this time.

translation.text: “我们当然应该逮捕它，不过看在它一贯表现良好的份上，这次就放过它吧。”
